title: Cyathea elegantissima
taxonomy: Cyathea elegantissima is a species of tree fern in the family Cyatheaceae. It is native to New Zealand and is known for its distinctive, elegant fronds. Cyathea elegantissima is a member of the order Cyatheales and the class Polypodiopsida, which includes all types of ferns. This plant is further classified into the division Pteridophyta and the kingdom Plantae. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a fern species.
